summary: Comprehensive testing of MANUTRIX industrial CMMS system completed. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate), frontend login and dashboard functioning correctly with industrial dark theme. All 7 demo assets showing correctly with proper TAGs, names, status, and criticidade. Navigation working via clickable stats cards.

navigation_issues.issue: Bottom navigation not visible on both desktop and mobile viewports - appears to be a CSS visibility issue with md:hidden class
navigation_issues.workaround: Navigation works via clickable dashboard stats cards

passed_tests: KPIs endpoint (/api/kpis) - showing Disponibilidade: 100.0%, MTTR: 0.0h, Backlog: 1
Ativos endpoint (/api/ativos) - all 7 demo assets found
Frontend login page with industrial dark theme (Slate 950 background)
Dashboard KPI cards showing correct values
Dashboard stats cards with correct counts
Ativos list page showing all 7 demo assets with TAG, nome, status, criticidade
Asset details: BOM-001, BOM-002, CMP-001, EST-001, MIS-001, EMB-001, TOR-001
Navigation via clickable stats cards to Ativos, OS, and Inspeções pages
Add buttons for Nova Inspeção and Nova OS
Quick action buttons on dashboard (Escanear QR, Nova OS)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix bottom navigation visibility issue - the md:hidden class may be preventing the navigation from showing on mobile. The bottom navigation component should be visible on mobile viewports to enable proper mobile-first navigation as intended.
